offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate daily accounts receivable aging reports and send alerts to collections teams instead of manual tracking of invoices and reminders.
problem: Tracking overdue payments and managing cash flow effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Share in community forums for freelancers
try_it: Let users try daily aging report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
